description: BatchAgent SDK, N=200, 1024-token system prompt, max_concurrent=32, max_turns=2, read_file tool with ToolPool dedup
note_tool_dedup: 200 agents all called bench_read_file2('/tmp/shared_document.txt'). ToolPool coalesced all 200 into one actual file read via asyncio.Future sharing. Dedup ratio: 200x.
note_cache: 93% prefix cache hit rate at N=200 vs 87.2% at N=20 — confirming hit rate grows with sustained load as all agents share the 1024-token system prompt prefix.
note_throughput: 5.5 agents/s vs 74.8 for naive. Expected: SDK adds multi-turn overhead (2 vLLM calls per agent = tool_use then final). Each agent needs 2 forward passes vs 1 for naive.
note_vllm_flag: vLLM 0.20 requires --enable-auto-tool-choice --tool-call-parser hermes for Qwen tool calling. Without these flags all tool-using requests return 400. This must be added to deploy/vllm_server.sh.
